data.title: In HelloNation, Wealth Advisor Ted Thatcher Details Estate and Legacy Planning
data.description: In a publication from HelloNation, Ted Thatcher from Bright Lake Wealth Management in Redding, California, discussed strategies for individuals to secure the smooth transfer of their assets to their heirs. The article, dated April 17, 2026, addressed ways to minimize complications in asset distribution. It highlighted the importance of proper estate planning to ensure assets are transferred according to one's wishes. Redding, California, served as the backdrop for the insights shared by Ted Thatcher in the article.

data.title: Theriva™ Biologics Announces Upcoming Presentation of Additional Data from the VIRAGE Phase 2b Clinical Trial of VCN-01 in Metastatic Pancreatic Cancer at AACR 2026 Annual Meeting
data.description: Results from the VIRAGE Phase 2b clinical trial reveal promising data on tumor response, biomarkers, and subgroup analyses supporting the immune-mediated action of VCN-01. The study shows enhanced outcomes in VCN-01 treated patients, especially those with liver metastases. The findings attest to the effectiveness of VCN-01 across various subgroups, indicating its potential in treating cancer.

data.title: QuasarEdge Acquisition Corporation Announces Exercise of Over-Allotment Option
data.description: QuasarEdge Acquisition Corporation (NYSE: QRED U) disclosed today that the underwriters of their initial public offering have decided to exercise their over-allotment option, acquiring an extra 1,500,000 units at the set public offering rate of $10.00 each. This move elevates the total units sold to 11,500,000. The closure of this over-allotment option is set for April 21, 2026, pending the fulfillment of regular closing prerequisites.

data.title: 4DMT Announces New Employment Inducement Grants
data.description: 4D Molecular Therapeutics, based in Emeryville, California, revealed that on April 14, 2026, five new non-executive employees were granted 67,600 Restricted Stock Units (RSUs) by the compensation committee of the company's board of directors. This move was made under the Company’s 2025 Employment Inducement Award Plan and as per Rule 5635(c)(4) of The Nasdaq Global Market. 4D Molecular Therapeutics is a prominent late-stage biotechnology firm focused on advancing targeted therapeutics that could revolutionize treatment approaches and deliver remarkable benefits to patients.

data.title: ORIC® Pharmaceuticals Presents Preclinical Data to Support the Potential of Rinzimetostat Across Prostate Cancer and in Emerging Resistance Settings at the 2026 American Association for Cancer Research (AACR) Annual Meeting
data.description: Today, ORIC Pharmaceuticals, Inc. (Nasdaq: ORIC), a clinical stage oncology company based in South San Francisco, California, and San Diego shared that they presented several posters at the 2026 American Association for Cancer Research (AACR) Annual Meeting. These posters showcased the potential of rinzimetostat (ORIC-944), which is a powerful allosteric inhibitor of PRC2, in treating prostate cancer. The company's website contains these publications for reference.

data.title: Pyxis Oncology to Present New Preclinical Data Showing Synergistic Anti-Tumor Activity in a HNSCC model with maMICVO in Combination with Anti-PD-1 at AACR 2026
data.description: In a preclinical study conducted on mice, monotherapy using Mouse analog of MICVO (maMICVO) demonstrated a dose-dependent inhibition of tumor growth. The study was carried out in a syngeneic model of Head and Neck Squamous Cell Carcinoma (HNSCC). The results showed that increasing doses of maMICVO led to a proportional decrease in tumor size. This suggests that maMICVO could be a promising treatment option for HNSCC. Further research is needed to explore the potential efficacy of maMICVO in human cases of HNSCC.

data.title: Talen Energy Announces Pricing of Senior Notes
data.description: Houston - On April 17, 2026, Talen Energy Corporation revealed that its subsidiary, Talen Energy Supply, LLC, has priced $1.5 billion in aggregate principal amount of 6.125% senior notes due 2031 and $2.5 billion in aggregate principal amount of 6.375% senior notes due 2033 in private placements. The total issuance, consisting of the 2031 Notes and 2033 Notes, amounts to $4 billion. The closing of the transaction is anticipated on April 29, 2026, pending customary closing prerequisites. The parent company's ticker symbol on NASDAQ is TLN.

data.title: CAMP4 Therapeutics Announces Inducement Grants Under Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4)
data.description: On April 15, 2026, CAMP4 Therapeutics Corporation in Cambridge, Mass., revealed that the Compensation Committee of the Company's Board of Directors awarded non-qualified stock options on the Grant Date. A total of 43,000 shares of the Company's common stock were granted to three new employees as part of their hiring inducement. CAMP4 is a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company listed on Nasdaq (Nasdaq: CAMP). The Company focuses on developing regulatory RNA-targeting therapeutics to upregulate gene expression and restore healthy protein levels to address various genetic diseases. The stock options serve as incentives for the new hires and comply with Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4).

data.title: hc1® CEO, Bradley Bostic Recognized as a 2026 Notable Leader in Health Care for Driving AI-Powered Health System Transformation
data.description: In Indianapolis, hc1® revealed that Bradley Bostic, Founder, Chairman, and CEO, has been recognized in the Crain's Chicago Business Notable Leaders in Health Care 2026 list. Bostic's focus on leveraging AI-driven insights to enhance healthcare delivery, optimize cost savings, minimize waste, and boost operational efficiency in extensive health systems gained him this honor. This acknowledgment underscores Bostic's dedication to revolutionizing healthcare practices, showcasing his leadership in the industry.

data.title: Paramount Declares Quarterly Cash Dividend
data.description: On April 17, 2026, the Paramount Skydance Corporation revealed its plans to issue a quarterly cash dividend of $0.05 per share to both Class A and Class B shareholders. This dividend will be distributed on July 1, 2026.

data.title: In HelloNation, Wealth Advisor Ted Thatcher Explains Managing Healthcare Costs in Retirement
data.description: In Roseville, California, on April 17, 2026, an article by Ted Thatcher of Bright Lake Wealth Management discussed the importance of preparing for uncertain healthcare expenses in retirement. Retirees are advised to carefully consider healthcare costs as part of their financial planning to avoid unexpected financial burdens. Bright Lake Wealth Management emphasizes the need for a comprehensive approach to retirement planning that includes accounting for potential healthcare expenses. Planning ahead can help retirees manage their finances effectively and ensure they are prepared for any medical costs that may arise.
Hingham Savings Reports First Quarter 2026 Results
Vera Bradley cancels current shareholder rights plan.

data.title: SEALSQ Announces Agenda of its 2026 Annual General Meeting of Shareholders
data.description: SEALSQ Corp, a company specializing in Semiconductors, PKI, and Post-Quantum technology products, will host its 2025 Annual General Meeting for shareholders on May 7, 2026, at 09:00 a.m. EST in Miami, FL. The meeting will be held at WeWork Office Space, Wynwood Garage, located at 360 NW 27th St, 33127. SEALSQ Corp (NASDAQ: LAES) is excited about the upcoming gathering, offering shareholders the opportunity to participate in crucial decisions and discussions.

data.title: VALUE LINE, INC. DIVIDEND HAS JUST BEEN RAISED FROM $1.30 TO $1.40 (ANNUALIZED) – ITS 12TH CONSECUTIVE INCREASE
data.description: On April 17, 2026, Value Line, Inc. (NASDAQ: VALU) disclosed an upsurge in its quarterly dividend to $0.35 per common share ($1.40 annually) following a decision by the Board of Directors. The enhanced cash dividend will be distributed on May 12, 2026, to shareholders of record as of April 27, 2026. This adjustment marks a 7.7% rise and signifies the 12th consecutive year of dividend growth for Value Line.
NASDAQ 100 extends rally to 13 days, longest streak since 2013.

data.title: Xilio Therapeutics Announces New Preclinical Data at AACR Annual Meeting for XTX601, a Masked T Cell Engager Targeting CLDN18.2
data.description: In various preclinical models, XTX601 has shown tumor-selective activation dependent on protease, along with strong anti-tumor effects.

data.title: Adagene Presents Two Posters at AACR 2026 with New Data Highlighting Muzastotug’s Potential as a Backbone Combination Therapy for Multiple Tumor Types
data.description: In a Phase 1b/2 trial for patients with locally advanced or metastatic/unresectable hepatocellular carcinoma, a triple combination of muzastotug, atezolizumab, and bevacizumab showed significantly higher overall response rates (ORR) of 66.7% compared to the 32.5% ORR of the atezolizumab + bevacizumab control arm as per HCC-specific Modified RECIST v1.1 by Investigator.

data.title: Cardiff Oncology Presents Preclinical Data on its PLK1 Inhibitor Onvansertib in Combination with a HER2-Targeted ADC at the 2026 AACR Annual Meeting
data.description: The combination of Onvansertib with trastuzumab deruxtecan showed increased antitumor effectiveness in HER2-low breast cancer models, leading to tumor regression and apoptosis. This suggests promise for patients with few treatment choices.
